inputs.shares_source: 65,423,184 common shares outstanding May 4, 2026 (10-Q Q1 2026 cover page)
inputs.fcf_source: [Assumption] Mid-cycle normalized owner cash: ~$7.8M annual (2021–2022 operating profit ~$13M less maintenance capital spending ~$6M) scaled to 65.4M diluted shares; current filing OCF minus capital spending is negative ($-0.29/sh FY2025)
inputs.cash_source: Cash, cash equivalents and restricted cash $57.9M at March 31, 2026 (10-Q; sec_companyfacts CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalents)
inputs.book_per_share_source: $273.3M equity / 65.4M shares [Assumption] using current share count on year-end equity
inputs.customer_concentration_source: Top five customers 67% of FY2025 revenue (10-K FY2025 concentration disclosure)
inputs.normalization_note: Reported FY2025 owner cash is negative (operating cash flow -$12.8M minus capital spending $6.0M). Lawrence base uses mid-cycle normalized owner cash anchored to 2021–2022 substrate upcycle economics, not spot losses. Q1 2026 gross margin recovery (29.6%) and revenue acceleration support normalization path but are not yet in base year-zero cash.

components.label: Specialty substrate manufacturing (InP, GaAs, Ge) at mid-cycle utilization

valuation.evidence: FY2021–2022 operating income ~$13M on ~$140M revenue; Q1 2026 revenue run-rate ~$108M with 29.6% gross margin; Coherent 6-inch InP supply agreement (8-K 2026-06-26) and Casela 2027 InP commitment (8-K 2026-06-17)
valuation.cross_check: Capital-cycle midcycle_capacity_value route; compare to 2019–2022 revenue and margin band

valuation.evidence: Vertical integration embedded in substrate margin; Nanjing/Chaoyang JinMei Gallium 85.5% owned (10-K FY2025)
valuation.cross_check: Not separately terminal-valued to avoid double-count with substrate operations

components.label: Cash, cash equivalents and restricted cash

valuation.cross_check: Down from $128.4M restricted+cash at Dec 2025 as proceeds deployed to Tongmei capacity

components.label: Tongmei Hong Kong listing option (STAR Market withdrawn July 2026)

valuation.evidence: Tongmei withdrew STAR Market IPO July 8, 2026; pivot to HK listing (8-K 2026-07-08). Prior PE investment RMB 324M (~$49M). Listing outcome uncertain.
valuation.cross_check: Probability-weighted; zero in Lawrence consolidated owner-cash path
valuation.falsifier: HK listing fails or PE redemptions drain parent cash before listing

driver_model.timing_basis: HK listing application per 8-K 2026-07-08; base realization 3 years

valuation.evidence: Eleven PE funds invested RMB 324,404,508 (~$49M) in Tongmei; STAR withdrawal triggers redemption rights at original investment (8-K 2026-07-08)
valuation.cross_check: High case assumes funds roll into HK listing; base assumes partial redemption

valuation.evidence: Shares outstanding rose from ~43.5M (Q1 2025) to 65.4M (May 2026) after Dec 2025 and Apr 2026 offerings (424B5, 8-K filings)
valuation.cross_check: S-3ASR shelf remains active; further dilution possible

bear.notes: China export or demand disruption; PE redemptions funded by parent; margin reverts to FY2025 trough; further dilution

base.notes: Mid-cycle owner cash $0.12/sh; InP AI/datacenter demand via Coherent/Casela contracts; utilization normalizes toward 2021–2022 economics on higher revenue base

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Tongmei subsidiary and China manufacturing assets may carry value below strategic worth; no land-at-zero pattern like TPL (10-K balance sheet)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in owner-cash path?
option_scan.evidence: Coherent 3-year 6-inch InP supply agreement (8-K 2026-06-26); Casela 2027 InP purchase commitment (8-K 2026-06-17); modeled in base growth, not separate terminal

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Tongmei PE stake and planned HK listing; STAR Market withdrawal July 2026 (8-K 2026-07-08)

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: AI-driven InP demand for high-speed optical data transmission cited in 10-K Item 1; revenue in substrate operations

stance_proposal.override_reason: Negative reported owner cash; customer concentration 67%; China/Tongmei corporate structure complexity; dilution from 2025–2026 offerings

marvin_floor.notes: Computed after marvin_valuation.py --write with market price

paths.label: Marvin mid-cycle owner cash (filings)
paths.weight_why: Capital-cycle route requires normalized economics, not trough losses

paths.label: Component schedule cross-check
paths.epistemic_tier: B (bounded estimates on Tongmei/HK option and PE redemption)
paths.weight_why: Corporate-structure risks not in pure DCF

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AXT Inc., including specialty substrate operations, consolidated gallium raw materials, cash, Tongmei listing option, and PE redemption/dilution reserves.
economic_claim.unit_source: 65,423,184 common shares outstanding May 4, 2026 (10-Q Q1 2026 cover page)
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating substrate value, cash, and real options are additive; PE redemption and dilution reserves are liability components; gallium vertical integration is embedded in substrate operations to avoid double-counting.

economic_value.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q via sec_companyfacts.json; mid-cycle owner cash is normalized [Assumption].

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

method_route.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
failure_modes: replacement cost used for assets that cannot earn their cost of capital
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

dilution_reserve: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required

pe_redemption_liability: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required

falsifiers: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
